zh.lifeSummary: 當Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir於大約0979年出生在英國德比夏爾艾吉頓時，他的父親Frane de Belvoir du Plessis21歲，母親Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir19歲。他和Matilda Crepon de Normandie至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1067年在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯勒 普萊希-格利姆爾特享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾波泰斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Fil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Frane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin. The name referred originally to a member of the tribe of the Franks, who are said to have got the name from a characteristic type of spear that they used. When the Franks migrated into Gaul in the 4th century, the country received its modern name of France (Late Latin Francia) and the tribal term Frank came to mean ‘Frenchman’. The name is now also used as a short form of Francis or Franklin .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir was born about 0979, in Egginton, Derbyshire, England, his father, Frane de Belvoir du Plessis, was 21 and his mother, Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Matilda Crepon de Normandie. He died about 1067, in Le Plessis-Grimoult, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 90, and was buried in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir est né environ 0979, à Egginton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Frane de Belvoir du Plessis, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Matilda Crepon de Normandie. Il est décédé environ 1067, à Le Plessis-Grimoult, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Bottesford, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir um 0979 in Egginton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Frane de Belvoir du Plessis 21 und seine Mutter Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir 19. Er hatte mit Matilda Crepon de Normandie mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1067 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Le Plessis-Grimoult, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir è nato il circa 0979 nel Egginton, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Frane de Belvoir du Plessis, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Matilda Crepon de Normandie. Morì circa 1067, nel Le Plessis-Grimoult, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveirが約0979年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエグジントンで生まれた時，父Frane de Belvoir du Plessisは21歳，母Lady Du Plessis De Belvoirは19歳であった。彼はMatilda Crepon de Normandieとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1067年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスル プレシス-グリモウルトで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアボッテスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir(이)가 대략 0979년 영국 더비실르 긴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Frane de Belvoir du Plessis(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Matilda Crepon de Normandie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1067년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 일 플레시스-그리모우트에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벗츠퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir nasceu aproximadamente 0979, em Egginton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Frane de Belvoir du Plessis, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Matilda Crepon de Normandie. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1067, em Le Plessis-Grimoult, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Osulf Fil Frane de Plessie Seigneur De Belveir родился около 0979 г. в местности эгинтон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Frane de Belvoir du Plessis было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Du Plessis De Belvoir, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Matilda Crepon de Normandie. Он умер около 1067 г. в местности л плессис-гримоулт, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности боттесфорд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Matilda Crepon de Normandie. Murió aproximadamente 1067, en Le Plessis-Grimoult, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
